title: Senior Software Engineer - NIIT - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - NIIT - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at NIIT. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Senior Software Engineer to strengthen our Chennai-based team.

About NIIT:
NIIT is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Go

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Professional development and training programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with NIIT!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
